reuseRationale: FLOW-03 is the third consecutive portability run for acme-pro-members. FLOW-01 (user-registration) established identity bounds; FLOW-02 (profile-enrichment) added enrichment knobs; FLOW-03 layers event organisation caps on top. A single tenant document carries the combined FREEDOM configuration — no per-flow re-seeding.

freedomOverrides.reason: acme-pro-members is a small premium tier — three events per organizer/week is the observed usage ceiling. Tightening the cap surfaces the RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED path on the 4th attempt and gives the portability probe a deterministic failure boundary.

Pro member events are curated small-group sessions. Dropping the per-event attendee ceiling to 10 proves the registration router honours the FREEDOM cap (Math.min(capacity, freedomMax)) and routes the 11th attendee to WAITLIST without code change.

Reserved waitlist ceiling for future waitlist-length enforcement. The current EventRegistrationManager does not yet gate on waitlist_max_size — this override is seeded to unblock the Sprint-B extension (WAITLIST_FULL code path) and to document the intended acme contour. Not exercised by the v1.0 adaptation spec.
freedomOverrides.proof: Reserved — not asserted in v1.0. Tracked in docs/portability/flow-03/FLOW-03-PORTABILITY-STATE.json § sprintBBacklog.

freedomOverrides.reason: Acme Pro Members has a policy of no push notifications for organiser-driven promotion. Narrowing the channel list to in-app only proves the promotion engine reads channels from FREEDOM rather than from hardcoded defaults, and that the EventPromoted payload reflects the tenant override.
Kept at default (24h window) — included in the profile so FC-ADAPT-4 has a deterministic window-start epoch to pre-compute the counter_key. Not an override; a pinned value.

Threshold slashed by 200x to make the PromotionCampaignCompleted emit reachable inside a single test — proves the threshold is FREEDOM-read and that the correct event name is emitted (NEVER EventPromotionCompleted, per IR-62-4).

expectedBehaviouralDelta.summary: Organiser with >=3 events → 4th create RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED. Event with capacity>10 → 11th attendee WAITLISTED. Promotion emits via in-app channel only. 5th campaign_engagement emits PromotionCampaignCompleted.
visualDelta: CreateEventPage: attempting the 4th event shows an acme-toned 'Event Limit Reached' toast (anchor AE-04)
EventDetailPage: capacity slider clamps to 10 when the acme tenant is active (anchor AE-05)
EventListPage: 'Promote' CTA, when clicked, shows 'Promoted to in-app feed' with no push option (anchor AE-06)

invariantMapping.P-1: No ClsService dependency — every FREEDOM read uses db.searchDocuments with explicit filter (verified in STEP-1-INVARIANTS grep sweep).
invariantMapping.P-2: @connectionType FLOW_SCOPED JSDoc present on all 4 services (committed v1.0.1).
invariantMapping.P-3: All override keys carry the flow03_ prefix — no cross-flow collision with flow01_, flow02_, flow04_.
invariantMapping.P-4: Services import IDatabaseService + IQueueService only — no local fabric clones (STEP-1 grep confirmed).
invariantMapping.P-5: requiredCoInstalls=[] declared in package.json (committed v1.0.3) AND behaviourally verified in phase-03-circular-install.spec.ts (committed v1.0.4).
